benefits.description: Libido boost reported as happy side effect
Feels great, reports MT-2 acts like a party drug on dosing day and tanning day

side_effects.description: Lots of people report feeling nauseated with MT-2

protocol_notes: Uses 500mcg MT-2 on Friday for weekend effects. Notes that MT-2 dose of 150mcg has been reported to perform well. Emphasizes research needed on tanning portion of MT-2 use. Primary use case is tanning, with libido as secondary benefit.
